title: Polish Chicken Bowl with Mellow French Twist
description: A hearty French-inspired dish featuring roasted chicken, served in a bowl with a variety of accompaniments.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt and pepper. Bake in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the chicken cooks, grill the Polish sausage over medium heat until browned.
Slice the roasted potatoes and grill them alongside the sausage for a crispy exterior.
Shred the mellow cheese and set aside for serving.
Assemble the bowl by placing the cooked chicken, sausage, and potatoes in the bowl.
Top with the shredded cheese and garnish with chopped parsley if desired.
